SEARCH
Package it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model

Class Face

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Face
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
NormalBack, NormalFace, StarterFront
public abstract class Face extends Object implements Serializable
The abstract Face class represents a face of a card. Each face has the ID of the Card it belongs to, the contents of its corners and the information about them that states if a corner is covered by another face or not, and the image of the Face. It implements Serializable to allow the coordinate objects to be serialized.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Face

      public Face(int id, Content[] corners, String imagePath)
      Constructs a new Face with the specified values.
      Parameters:
      id - the card's id it belongs to
      corners - the array that contains the Content of each corner. The contents' order must be:
      • corners[0] for the top left Content
      • corners[1] for the top right Content
      • corners[2] for the bottom left Content
      • corners[3] for the bottom right Content
      imagePath - the path of the image that represents this Face. This image will be used in GUI.

  • Method Details

    • getCornerList

      public Content[] getCornerList()
      Returns a copy of the array that contains the Content of each corner. The contents' order is:
      • getCornerList()[0] for the top left Content
      • getCornerList()[1] for the top right Content
      • getCornerList()[2] for the bottom left Content
      • getCornerList()[3] for the bottom right Content
      Returns:
      an array that contains the Content of each corner

    • getIdCard

      public int getIdCard()
      Returns the ID of the Card which this face belongs to
      Returns:
      the ID of the Card which this face belongs to

    • getTL

      public Content getTL()
      Returns the Content in the top left corner.
      Returns:
      the Content in the top left corner

    • getTR

      public Content getTR()
      Returns the Content in the top right corner.
      Returns:
      the Content in the top right corner

    • getBL

      public Content getBL()
      Returns the Content in the bottom left corner.
      Returns:
      the Content in the bottom left corner

    • getBR

      public Content getBR()
      Returns the Content in the bottom right corner.
      Returns:
      the Content in the bottom right corner

    • setCoveredTL

      public void setCoveredTL()
      Sets the top left corner as covered

    • setCoveredTR

      public void setCoveredTR()
      Sets the top right corner as covered

    • setCoveredBL

      public void setCoveredBL()
      Sets the bottom left corner as covered

    • setCoveredBR

      public void setCoveredBR()
      Sets the bottom right corner as covered

    • isCoveredTL

      public boolean isCoveredTL()
      Checks if the top left corner is covered by another face.
      Returns:
      true if the top left corner is covered, false if it is not

    • isCoveredTR

      public boolean isCoveredTR()
      Checks if the top right corner is covered by another face.
      Returns:
      true if the top right corner is covered, false if it is not

    • isCoveredBL

      public boolean isCoveredBL()
      Checks if the bottom left corner is covered by another face.
      Returns:
      true if the bottom left corner is covered, false if it is not

    • isCoveredBR

      public boolean isCoveredBR()
      Checks if the bottom right corner is covered by another face.
      Returns:
      true if the bottom right corner is covered, false if it is not

    • getImagePath

      public String getImagePath()
      Returns:
      the image path of this Face
